pr_text:
## Title: Fix race condition in itti_get_task_name by adding missing mutex lock

### Summary
The `itti_get_task_name()` function in the ITTI (Inter-Task Communication Interface) subsystem accessed the global `tasks` array without acquiring the `lock_nb_queues` mutex. This created a race condition where concurrent reads from this function and writes from task management operations could lead to undefined behavior, including potential use-after-free or access to inconsistent data during task initi
